capabilities.name: Live bank feeds (Plaid/Tink/GoCardless)
capabilities.verify: Scaffold shipped 2026-07-08 — bank_feed_connections table, provider adapter interface (src/lib/reconciliation/bank-feed-providers.ts), BankFeedsPanel UI with Plaid/Tink/GoCardless 'Connect (coming soon)' cards. CSV/CAMT/MT940/OFX/SIE + Stripe payout sync are the live ingestion path. Real aggregator adapters need paid provider credentials.
capabilities.notes: Partial — infrastructure done, live aggregator sync deferred until credentials are provisioned.

capabilities.name: Configurable matching rules
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: Stage-3 live over MCP gateway — manage_reconciliation_rule create→list (rule 'Google Ads → 6541' priority 100 contains GOOGLE→6541), apply_reconciliation_rules ran (tagged 0, no unmatched tx). UI: ReconciliationRulesPanel.tsx (Rules tab in ReconciliationPage) + useReconciliationRules hook — priority-ordered list, create/edit dialog (match_field/type/pattern/account), 'Run rules now'. reconciliation_rules table + apply_reconciliation_rules RPC.
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-14; admin UI built + Stage-3 live-verified 2026-07-06 (commit 87089ad3).

capabilities.name: Partial-match variance tools
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. reconciliation_matches gains variance_cents/variance_account_code/variance_journal_entry_id. RPC create_partial_match_with_variance posts a balanced JE (Öresutjämning default 3740) and inserts the match row atomically. UI: PartialMatchDialog (Scale icon on unmatched rows) computes bank vs expected diff, picks variance account, submits.

capabilities.name: Petty-cash reconciliation
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Table petty_cash_counts (cash_account_code, counted_cents, book_balance_cents, difference_cents, diff_account_code). RPC record_petty_cash_count computes book balance from journal_entry_lines net for the cash account up to count_date and posts the diff to a cash-diff account (default 7960). UI: PettyCashPanel — enter counted amount, see book vs counted, post diff. Count history table.

capabilities.name: Reconciliation sign-off
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Table reconciliation_signoffs (bank_account_id, period_start/end, statement_balance_cents, book_balance_cents, difference_cents, reconciled_by/at) with unique(bank_account_id, period). RPC signoff_reconciliation rejects sign-off if statement ≠ book. Trigger tg_recmatch_signoff_lock blocks UPDATE/DELETE on reconciliation_matches whose bank tx falls in a signed-off period (service_role bypass for corrections). UI: ReconciliationSignoffPanel.

capabilities.name: Reconciliation summary report
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: reconciliation_report(from,to) live over gateway → matched/unmatched/rule_suggested counts+cents. UI: ReconciliationReportPanel.tsx (Report tab) + useReconciliationReport hook — from/to pickers (default current month), 4 KPI cards (total/matched/unmatched/rule-suggested), SEK amounts, matched green / unmatched red.
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-14; admin UI built + Stage-3 live-verified 2026-07-06 (commit 87089ad3).
